# neon_organization (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a Neon organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_organization" "example" {
  id = "your-organization-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The organization ID.

### Read-Only

- `allow_hipaa_projects` (Boolean) If true, the organization is allowed to mark projects as HIPAA.
- `created_at` (String) A timestamp indicating when the organization was created, in RFC 3339 format.
- `handle` (String) The organization handle.
- `managed_by` (String) How the organization is managed. Organizations created via the Console or the API are managed by `console`.
- `name` (String) The organization name.
- `plan` (String) The organization billing plan.
- `updated_at` (String) A timestamp indicating when the organization was updated, in RFC 3339 format.
